task_completion.description: Create a new onboarding plan named 'New Employee Onboarding'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo 'Plans' configuration screen showing a new plan being created or saved with the exact name 'New Employee Onboarding'.

task_completion.description: Add activity template: 'Set up workstation and IT accounts' assigned to Coach
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an activity template within the plan with the Summary 'Set up workstation and IT accounts' and the Responsible field set to 'Coach'.

task_completion.description: Add activity template: 'Complete new hire paperwork' assigned to Employee
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an activity template within the plan with the Summary 'Complete new hire paperwork' and the Responsible field set to 'Employee'.

task_completion.description: Add activity template: 'Schedule orientation meeting' assigned to Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an activity template within the plan with the Summary 'Schedule orientation meeting' and the Responsible field set to 'Manager'.

task_completion.description: Add activity template: 'Assign onboarding buddy' assigned to Coach
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an activity template within the plan with the Summary 'Assign onboarding buddy' and the Responsible field set to 'Coach'.

task_completion.description: Launch the onboarding plan for employee Eli Lambert
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a wizard, modal, or action screen in Odoo (e.g., 'Launch Plan') where 'New Employee Onboarding' is selected and the target employee 'Eli Lambert' is specified.

task_completion.description: Ensure the activities are scheduled on Eli Lambert's record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Eli Lambert's employee record or the Odoo chatter/activities panel showing the four specific onboarding activities successfully scheduled for him.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is interacting with the Odoo application in a web browser, not using terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the reusable plan rather than just manually adding activities to the employee.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the 'Plans' or 'Activity Templates' configuration menus in Odoo, proving the reusable plan was built.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure all data entry happens within the Odoo application input fields and not in a separate text editor or notes app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The onboarding plan must be exactly named 'New Employee Onboarding'. It must contain exactly 4 activity templates with specific responsible roles: 1) 'Set up workstation and IT accounts' (Coach), 2) 'Complete new hire paperwork' (Employee), 3) 'Schedule orientation meeting' (Manager), and 4) 'Assign onboarding buddy' (Coach). The target employee to launch the plan for is 'Eli Lambert'.
